channel.title: If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die
channel.description: An AI-narrated audiobook adaptation of the hit Korean web novel. A Korean man wakes up trapped inside a BL romance fantasy novel — as a background extra destined to die. To survive, he must make sure the main characters fall in love. New episodes daily. Perfect for fans of isekai, manhwa, BL romance, and Korean web novels.
channel.itunes:author: WebNovel AI Studio

image.title: If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die

channel.itunes:subtitle: Survive the story. Don't become the main character.
channel.itunes:keywords: korean web novel, BL romance, isekai, manhwa, audiobook, fantasy, romance, light novel, webnovel, AI audiobook, Korean fiction, BL fantasy, otome isekai

item.title: Episode 85 Blood magic and monstrous regeneration
item.description: In Episode 85, Leonardo finds himself locked in a deadly struggle with a monstrous lizard that heals from its own blood—a weapon that closes around his blade as if it were never there. When the creature's regenerative powers force him to confront his worst fear, he must decide whether to become its next meal or risk everything to escape this nightmarish world. The stakes are higher than ever—survival hinges on mastering a dark magic few have dared to wield.
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 85, Leonardo finds himself locked in a deadly struggle with a monstrous lizard that heals from its own blood—a weapon that closes around his blade as if it were never there. When the creature's regenerative powers force him to confront his worst fear, he must decide whether to become its next meal or risk everything to escape this nightmarish world. The stakes are higher than ever—survival hinges on mastering a dark magic few have dared to wield.

item.title: Episode 84 The ritual begins in the cave pit
item.description: In the depths of an ancient cave, you're thrust into a ritual where survival hinges on becoming the main character in your own story—or dying trying. When the stakes are raised with every drop of blood and every twist of fate, can you outsmart a creature that regenerates, or will you join its eerie collection of victims?
item.itunes:summary: In the depths of an ancient cave, you're thrust into a ritual where survival hinges on becoming the main character in your own story—or dying trying. When the stakes are raised with every drop of blood and every twist of fate, can you outsmart a creature that regenerates, or will you join its eerie collection of victims?

item.title: Episode 83 Fresh ingredients, simple meal preparation begins
item.description: In the desolate wilderness, two survivors must rely on ancient skills to prepare their first meal in weeks. As they ignite a long-dormant oven and gather fresh ingredients from a neglected garden, every action feels weighted—mistakes could mean life or death. Will their simple bruschetta become more than just sustenance, or will it be their last?
item.itunes:summary: In the desolate wilderness, two survivors must rely on ancient skills to prepare their first meal in weeks. As they ignite a long-dormant oven and gather fresh ingredients from a neglected garden, every action feels weighted—mistakes could mean life or death. Will their simple bruschetta become more than just sustenance, or will it be their last?

item.title: Episode 82 The comfort of shared silence and proximity
item.description: In this tense episode, two strangers are forced into shared quarters under the guise of family, only for the calm facade to unravel with each passing moment. As darkness falls and the air thickens with unspoken secrets, they must navigate through a web of signals and silent communications, knowing that one wrong move could be their last.
item.itunes:summary: In this tense episode, two strangers are forced into shared quarters under the guise of family, only for the calm facade to unravel with each passing moment. As darkness falls and the air thickens with unspoken secrets, they must navigate through a web of signals and silent communications, knowing that one wrong move could be their last.

item.title: Episode 81 Nameless Ones
item.description: In the heart of a forgotten mountain village, two lost adventurers find themselves in a precarious situation when they encounter a local resident who has witnessed their bizarre appearance—nearly naked in a damp cave. With no dialogue and little context, they must rely on quick thinking and diplomacy to avoid suspicion—or worse. As the stakes rise, one misstep could mean becoming more than just nameless: it could mean death.
item.itunes:summary: In the heart of a forgotten mountain village, two lost adventurers find themselves in a precarious situation when they encounter a local resident who has witnessed their bizarre appearance—nearly naked in a damp cave. With no dialogue and little context, they must rely on quick thinking and diplomacy to avoid suspicion—or worse. As the stakes rise, one misstep could mean becoming more than just nameless: it could mean death.

item.title: Episode 80 Whispers and warmth by the dying fire
item.description: In a world where survival hinges on becoming the main character in your own story, Leovald finds himself caring for a stranger whose life hangs by a thread. As they huddle around a dying fire, the line between protector and pawn blurs, and whispers of danger echo through the night. Can he keep the man alive long enough to rewrite their fate—or will the shadows claim them both?
item.itunes:summary: In a world where survival hinges on becoming the main character in your own story, Leovald finds himself caring for a stranger whose life hangs by a thread. As they huddle around a dying fire, the line between protector and pawn blurs, and whispers of danger echo through the night. Can he keep the man alive long enough to rewrite their fate—or will the shadows claim them both?

item.title: My stomach was full, but fatigue from the day’s hardships
item.description: In a world where existence hinges on narrative importance, you either become the main character—or cease to exist. As fatigue sets in and supplies dwindle, our protagonist faces a harrowing decision: press on through uncharted forests or risk being forgotten by fate itself. Can they find a village before it's too late, or will their every step be erased from the story’s stage?
item.itunes:summary: In a world where existence hinges on narrative importance, you either become the main character—or cease to exist. As fatigue sets in and supplies dwindle, our protagonist faces a harrowing decision: press on through uncharted forests or risk being forgotten by fate itself. Can they find a village before it's too late, or will their every step be erased from the story’s stage?

item.title: Episode 78 Survival begins with immediate necessities
item.description: In Episode 78: Survival Begins with Immediate Necessities, the stakes are high as three survivors must decide whether to risk returning to a perilous stronghold or seek shelter elsewhere in the wilderness. With monsters swarming and darkness closing in, their choices could mean life or death—literally. Can they trust each other enough to survive the night, or will old rivalries tear them apart?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 78: Survival Begins with Immediate Necessities, the stakes are high as three survivors must decide whether to risk returning to a perilous stronghold or seek shelter elsewhere in the wilderness. With monsters swarming and darkness closing in, their choices could mean life or death—literally. Can they trust each other enough to survive the night, or will old rivalries tear them apart?

item.title: Episode 77 Stone projectile shockwave hits the bridge
item.description:
A lone traveler finds herself trapped on a stone bridge as a monstrous Rock Pouch Bison closes in, launching deadly projectile rocks with each enraged convulsion of its throat. With every shattering crash and bone-crushing impact, the line between survival and death grows thinner—will she become the monster’s next meal or rewrite her fate?
The ground trembles beneath your feet as the beast's relentless assault escalates, pushing you to the brink of collapse. Can one human stand against such a formidable predator, or will the bridge be their final resting place?
item.itunes:summary:
A lone traveler finds herself trapped on a stone bridge as a monstrous Rock Pouch Bison closes in, launching deadly projectile rocks with each enraged convulsion of its throat. With every shattering crash and bone-crushing impact, the line between survival and death grows thinner—will she become the monster’s next meal or rewrite her fate?
The ground trembles beneath your feet as the beast's relentless assault escalates, pushing you to the brink of collapse. Can one human stand against such a formidable predator, or will the bridge be their final resting place?

item.title: Episode 76 The truth behind forbidden love
item.description:
In a kingdom where forbidden love is not just a whisper but a deadly secret, two knights find themselves caught in the crossfire of ancient courtly intrigue. As they navigate the treacherous waters of noble politics, one misstep could unravel decades-old family secrets and plunge them into an abyss of betrayal—where only the true heir to the main character’s role can survive.
With the Count's tragic past looming large, our heroes must now uncover the truth behind his devoted letters and flowers, all while avoiding the eyes of a father who has locked away his heart. The stakes are higher than they
item.itunes:summary:
In a kingdom where forbidden love is not just a whisper but a deadly secret, two knights find themselves caught in the crossfire of ancient courtly intrigue. As they navigate the treacherous waters of noble politics, one misstep could unravel decades-old family secrets and plunge them into an abyss of betrayal—where only the true heir to the main character’s role can survive.
With the Count's tragic past looming large, our heroes must now uncover the truth behind his devoted letters and flowers, all while avoiding the eyes of a father who has locked away his heart. The stakes are higher than they

item.title: Episode 75 Cooking skills improve more than fighting
item.description: In this episode, our hero discovers that mastering the art of cooking might just be the key to survival in a world where food is as deadly as combat. When the main character starts preparing meals, strange and dangerous interactions with the knights ensue, leading to unexpected alliances and threats. Can learning to cook cabbage rolls really save him from an early grave—or will it lead to his downfall?
item.itunes:summary: In this episode, our hero discovers that mastering the art of cooking might just be the key to survival in a world where food is as deadly as combat. When the main character starts preparing meals, strange and dangerous interactions with the knights ensue, leading to unexpected alliances and threats. Can learning to cook cabbage rolls really save him from an early grave—or will it lead to his downfall?

item.title: Episode 74 Venom and biology revealed in detail
item.description: Welcome back to "Nature's Deadliest Predators," where every episode unravels the secrets of Earth’s most fearsome creatures. In this gripping episode, we dive deep into the deadly world of the Red-Crested Lizard—where its venomous bite and regenerative tail make it a predator both feared and misunderstood. Can you survive its lethal neurotoxin? Or will you become its next meal?
item.itunes:summary: Welcome back to "Nature's Deadliest Predators," where every episode unravels the secrets of Earth’s most fearsome creatures. In this gripping episode, we dive deep into the deadly world of the Red-Crested Lizard—where its venomous bite and regenerative tail make it a predator both feared and misunderstood. Can you survive its lethal neurotoxin? Or will you become its next meal?

item.title: Episode 73 Intermission
item.description: In Episode 73: Intermission, the main character awakens from an unprecedented two-day slumber, only to find themselves in a strange limbo between dreams and reality. As they savor a simple stew with their companions, the quiet interlude hints at deeper stakes—staying true to the story or being cast aside as mere background. The calm before the storm is palpable, but the listener can’t help but wonder: if you don't become the main character, will you truly survive?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 73: Intermission, the main character awakens from an unprecedented two-day slumber, only to find themselves in a strange limbo between dreams and reality. As they savor a simple stew with their companions, the quiet interlude hints at deeper stakes—staying true to the story or being cast aside as mere background. The calm before the storm is palpable, but the listener can’t help but wonder: if you don't become the main character, will you truly survive?

item.title: Episode 72 The truth behind the wreckage unfolds
item.description: In Episode 72, "If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die," the stakes rise as Leonardo finds himself trapped in a body with a notorious past. As he navigates through the wreckage of an inn set ablaze by his own actions, suspicions mount that he might be more than just a wandering hero. Can he reclaim his reputation—or will the true owner of this rogue's body destroy everything he holds dear?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 72, "If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die," the stakes rise as Leonardo finds himself trapped in a body with a notorious past. As he navigates through the wreckage of an inn set ablaze by his own actions, suspicions mount that he might be more than just a wandering hero. Can he reclaim his reputation—or will the true owner of this rogue's body destroy everything he holds dear?

item.title: Episode 71 Leaving sinistra before nightfall
item.description: In the heart of Sinistra's looming danger, the group faces an urgent decision: flee or face certain death. As the clouds part and a new day dawns, old promises and forgotten identities collide, forcing them to question who they truly are—and what they're willing to lose. Time is running out as they realize that staying means becoming the very targets they seek to escape.
item.itunes:summary: In the heart of Sinistra's looming danger, the group faces an urgent decision: flee or face certain death. As the clouds part and a new day dawns, old promises and forgotten identities collide, forcing them to question who they truly are—and what they're willing to lose. Time is running out as they realize that staying means becoming the very targets they seek to escape.

item.title: Episode 70 His touch is a dangerous kind of healing
item.description: In a world where only the main character can truly heal, Leonardo's desperate attempt at saving you takes an unexpected turn. As his touch reveals your body’s resistance to conventional magic, you must decide whether to embrace your unique nature—or risk dying in the process. Stakes are high as friends and foes alike question your true role in this deadly story.
item.itunes:summary: In a world where only the main character can truly heal, Leonardo's desperate attempt at saving you takes an unexpected turn. As his touch reveals your body’s resistance to conventional magic, you must decide whether to embrace your unique nature—or risk dying in the process. Stakes are high as friends and foes alike question your true role in this deadly story.

item.title: Episode 69 The wagon careens into chaos again
item.description: In Episode 69, the wagon careens into chaos as its unstable condition forces the team to make perilous turns under threat of discovery. With Leonardo fighting for control amidst the mules' panic, it becomes clear that their survival hinges on more than just skillful driving—it’s a race against time and an unseen force pulling at the edges of reality. Can they escape unscathed, or will the wagon's instability claim them as its victims?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 69, the wagon careens into chaos as its unstable condition forces the team to make perilous turns under threat of discovery. With Leonardo fighting for control amidst the mules' panic, it becomes clear that their survival hinges on more than just skillful driving—it’s a race against time and an unseen force pulling at the edges of reality. Can they escape unscathed, or will the wagon's instability claim them as its victims?

item.title: Episode 68 The truth behind the borrowed body
item.description: In this tense episode, a protagonist finds themselves trapped in a borrowed body, struggling for breath as an enigmatic entity holds them captive. With time running out and the stakes higher than ever, they must uncover the truth behind their predicament—before the entity decides it's truly game over. Can they escape or will they become just another chapter in its sinister narrative?
item.itunes:summary: In this tense episode, a protagonist finds themselves trapped in a borrowed body, struggling for breath as an enigmatic entity holds them captive. With time running out and the stakes higher than ever, they must uncover the truth behind their predicament—before the entity decides it's truly game over. Can they escape or will they become just another chapter in its sinister narrative?

item.title: The moment I spotted Count Bermont approaching across the
item.description: In the heart of a strange narrative, you're thrust into a world where your every decision shapes the story—or dooms it. As Count Bermont's monstrous form stalks the streets, you must choose: become the hero who writes their fate, or let them consume everything in their path. One wrong move could mean losing not just your life, but reality itself.
item.itunes:summary: In the heart of a strange narrative, you're thrust into a world where your every decision shapes the story—or dooms it. As Count Bermont's monstrous form stalks the streets, you must choose: become the hero who writes their fate, or let them consume everything in their path. One wrong move could mean losing not just your life, but reality itself.

item.title: Episode 66 The labyrinth ends, chaos begins anew
item.description: In a labyrinth that has claimed countless lives, you’ve finally made it to the end—only to find chaos erupting on the surface. The ground trembles, and the city lies in ruins around you. As the rules shift and survival becomes a race against time, can you reclaim your role as the main character or will the labyrinth claim another victim?
item.itunes:summary: In a labyrinth that has claimed countless lives, you’ve finally made it to the end—only to find chaos erupting on the surface. The ground trembles, and the city lies in ruins around you. As the rules shift and survival becomes a race against time, can you reclaim your role as the main character or will the labyrinth claim another victim?

item.title: Episode 65 Water breaks through ancient sins
item.description: In a labyrinth built to contain ancient sins, you must become the main character—or die trying. As water begins to flood the underground maze, the stakes are higher than ever. Can Leo and Orlie escape before the sacred pond's waters claim them, or will they be swept into its damning tide?
item.itunes:summary: In a labyrinth built to contain ancient sins, you must become the main character—or die trying. As water begins to flood the underground maze, the stakes are higher than ever. Can Leo and Orlie escape before the sacred pond's waters claim them, or will they be swept into its damning tide?

item.title: Episode 64
item.description: In Episode 64, "If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die," the stakes are higher than ever as Sinistra and her companions race through a labyrinthine trap set by the enigmatic Count. With every step, the weight of past resets threatens to bring them crashing down, while the mysterious disappearance of the Count adds an eerie layer of uncertainty. Can they outmaneuver their pursuer and escape before it's too late—or will they become just another forgotten soul in the labyrinth?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 64, "If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die," the stakes are higher than ever as Sinistra and her companions race through a labyrinthine trap set by the enigmatic Count. With every step, the weight of past resets threatens to bring them crashing down, while the mysterious disappearance of the Count adds an eerie layer of uncertainty. Can they outmaneuver their pursuer and escape before it's too late—or will they become just another forgotten soul in the labyrinth?

item.title: Episode 63 Reality shifts when stories change
item.description: In a world where reality bends to the will of storytellers, one protagonist finds themselves trapped in a frozen, colorless nightmare. As they struggle against an unseen force that rewinds and reshapes their fate, they must decide: Will they become the main character—or face certain death? The line between fiction and reality blurs, and every decision could be their last.
item.itunes:summary: In a world where reality bends to the will of storytellers, one protagonist finds themselves trapped in a frozen, colorless nightmare. As they struggle against an unseen force that rewinds and reshapes their fate, they must decide: Will they become the main character—or face certain death? The line between fiction and reality blurs, and every decision could be their last.

item.title: Episode 62 The quest begins with dwindling resources
item.description: In the depths of an underground labyrinth, three unlikely allies must navigate dwindling resources and unstable mental states to survive—or risk resetting into oblivion. With every failed attempt, their health and sanity crumble, making each decision a gamble between life and death. Can they rescue Vittorio and escape before they fall victim to the quest's cruel reset cycle?
item.itunes:summary: In the depths of an underground labyrinth, three unlikely allies must navigate dwindling resources and unstable mental states to survive—or risk resetting into oblivion. With every failed attempt, their health and sanity crumble, making each decision a gamble between life and death. Can they rescue Vittorio and escape before they fall victim to the quest's cruel reset cycle?

item.title: Episode 61
item.description: In Episode 61, our protagonist finds themselves trapped in a labyrinthine underworld where every step could be their last. As mysterious tremors shake the very ground beneath them, they must navigate deadly resets and confront the truth about Vittorio’s fate—without ever becoming the main character of this deadly scenario. Can they escape before the stakes reach a catastrophic climax?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 61, our protagonist finds themselves trapped in a labyrinthine underworld where every step could be their last. As mysterious tremors shake the very ground beneath them, they must navigate deadly resets and confront the truth about Vittorio’s fate—without ever becoming the main character of this deadly scenario. Can they escape before the stakes reach a catastrophic climax?

item.title: Episode 60 A secret revealed by a touch
item.description: In Episode 60, Leovald's world is turned upside down when an innocent touch reveals a hidden secret that could unravel years of trust. The stakes are high as old allegiances fracture, and the line between friend and foe blurs in this tense episode where secrets threaten to bring down everything he holds dear. Can Leovald uncover the truth without losing those closest to him?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 60, Leovald's world is turned upside down when an innocent touch reveals a hidden secret that could unravel years of trust. The stakes are high as old allegiances fracture, and the line between friend and foe blurs in this tense episode where secrets threaten to bring down everything he holds dear. Can Leovald uncover the truth without losing those closest to him?

item.title: The Count of Bermont stared silently into the distance. The
item.description:
In the eerie shadows of Count Bermont's castle, Viscount Lopez finds himself trapped between loyalty and survival. When the count demands the truth from his trusted advisor, the line between friend and foe blurs, pushing Lopez to a breaking point. As whispers of betrayal fill the air, one misstep could spell doom for both man and city.
The Count’s cold gaze pierces through secrets and lies, leaving Viscount Lopez with no choice but to unravel the truth—or face the snapping fingers that threaten his very existence. Can he trust anyone in this labyrinthine world? Or will he become just
item.itunes:summary:
In the eerie shadows of Count Bermont's castle, Viscount Lopez finds himself trapped between loyalty and survival. When the count demands the truth from his trusted advisor, the line between friend and foe blurs, pushing Lopez to a breaking point. As whispers of betrayal fill the air, one misstep could spell doom for both man and city.
The Count’s cold gaze pierces through secrets and lies, leaving Viscount Lopez with no choice but to unravel the truth—or face the snapping fingers that threaten his very existence. Can he trust anyone in this labyrinthine world? Or will he become just

item.title: Episode 58 The world's gaze on a corpse
item.description: In Episode 58, the stakes rise as our protagonist confronts Count Bermont in a chilling revelation: the dead can inhabit the bodies of the living. With each word, the Count’s fanaticism deepens, hinting at a sinister plan that could unravel the very fabric of life and death. Can our hero uncover the truth before he too becomes a pawn in this deadly game?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 58, the stakes rise as our protagonist confronts Count Bermont in a chilling revelation: the dead can inhabit the bodies of the living. With each word, the Count’s fanaticism deepens, hinting at a sinister plan that could unravel the very fabric of life and death. Can our hero uncover the truth before he too becomes a pawn in this deadly game?

item.title: Episode 57 Calculating every move in this tavern
item.description: In the heart of a bustling tavern, negotiations for a life-altering deal unfold with deadly precision. As the stakes rise and the true identities of each player are revealed glass by glass, one misstep could mean death. Can you outmaneuver the Count and his entourage—or will you become just another character in their game?
item.itunes:summary: In the heart of a bustling tavern, negotiations for a life-altering deal unfold with deadly precision. As the stakes rise and the true identities of each player are revealed glass by glass, one misstep could mean death. Can you outmaneuver the Count and his entourage—or will you become just another character in their game?

item.title: Episode 56 The cloak appears in the dark city
item.description: In the shadowy alleys of a city where night falls faster than day, you find yourself not just a spectator but a player in a deadly game. As a cloak flutters ominously on a rooftop, alliances are tested and trust becomes as fragile as the threads that weave through the dark streets. Can you claim the mantle of the main character—or will you be left to fade into the shadows?
item.itunes:summary: In the shadowy alleys of a city where night falls faster than day, you find yourself not just a spectator but a player in a deadly game. As a cloak flutters ominously on a rooftop, alliances are tested and trust becomes as fragile as the threads that weave through the dark streets. Can you claim the mantle of the main character—or will you be left to fade into the shadows?

item.title: Episode 55 The count's unexpected visit to the inn
item.description: In the eerie silence of a fog-shrouded inn, you thought you had outsmarted the Count. But when his presence is suddenly felt in your very midst, calm quickly turns to dread. With Leovald’s fate hanging by a thread and the Count's motives unclear, every shadow holds a potential threat—until you realize your clever plan might just be leading you straight into an even darker trap.
item.itunes:summary: In the eerie silence of a fog-shrouded inn, you thought you had outsmarted the Count. But when his presence is suddenly felt in your very midst, calm quickly turns to dread. With Leovald’s fate hanging by a thread and the Count's motives unclear, every shadow holds a potential threat—until you realize your clever plan might just be leading you straight into an even darker trap.

item.title: Episode 54 Waiting for the inevitable confrontation begins
item.description: In Episode 54: "Waiting for the Inevitable Confrontation Begins," the stakes are higher than ever as our protagonist finds themselves in a tense standoff with the enigmatic Viscount. With just moments until the confrontation they've been dreading, they must navigate uncomfortable positions and hidden dangers while trying to stay alert. Can they hold their ground or will the tension finally break?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 54: "Waiting for the Inevitable Confrontation Begins," the stakes are higher than ever as our protagonist finds themselves in a tense standoff with the enigmatic Viscount. With just moments until the confrontation they've been dreading, they must navigate uncomfortable positions and hidden dangers while trying to stay alert. Can they hold their ground or will the tension finally break?

item.title: Episode 53 The masked visitor arrives at the mansion
item.description: In Episode 53, Viscount Lopez finds himself face-to-face with a masked visitor who has arrived at his very doorstep. As tensions rise and secrets are revealed, Lopez must decide whether to trust this unexpected ally—or if he's walking straight into a deadly trap. The stakes are higher than ever as the true intentions of Count Bermont become clear, threatening everything Lopez holds dear.
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 53, Viscount Lopez finds himself face-to-face with a masked visitor who has arrived at his very doorstep. As tensions rise and secrets are revealed, Lopez must decide whether to trust this unexpected ally—or if he's walking straight into a deadly trap. The stakes are higher than ever as the true intentions of Count Bermont become clear, threatening everything Lopez holds dear.

item.title: Episode 52 Hooked!
item.description: In a world where your actions in one life determine your fate in another, you're only as good as your last choice. When a mysterious count's henchman offers an unlikely escape route, you must decide: risk everything for a chance at redemption—or stay and face the consequences of your past. In this episode, every decision could be your last.
item.itunes:summary: In a world where your actions in one life determine your fate in another, you're only as good as your last choice. When a mysterious count's henchman offers an unlikely escape route, you must decide: risk everything for a chance at redemption—or stay and face the consequences of your past. In this episode, every decision could be your last.

item.title: Episode 51
item.description: In Episode 51, our protagonist finds themselves thrust into a dangerous game where loyalty and survival are tested. With each move, they must navigate between angering powerful forces and risking their own life. As tensions rise, they realize that only by becoming the main character in this deadly drama can they hope to survive—or be sacrificed entirely.
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 51, our protagonist finds themselves thrust into a dangerous game where loyalty and survival are tested. With each move, they must navigate between angering powerful forces and risking their own life. As tensions rise, they realize that only by becoming the main character in this deadly drama can they hope to survive—or be sacrificed entirely.

item.title: Episode 50 Flames and arrows block the escape path
item.description: In a world where only the main character can survive, you are trapped in a deadly game of cat and mouse. As flames and arrows block your escape route, you must confront not just your pursuers but also the haunting echoes of past failures. One misstep could mean death—or worse, losing your chance at redemption entirely.
item.itunes:summary: In a world where only the main character can survive, you are trapped in a deadly game of cat and mouse. As flames and arrows block your escape route, you must confront not just your pursuers but also the haunting echoes of past failures. One misstep could mean death—or worse, losing your chance at redemption entirely.

item.title: Episode 49
item.description: In the heart of Sinistra's chaotic night market, five mercenaries gather for an illicit task: disposing of a corpse amid the bustling crowds. But as they descend into a hidden alley leading to a nearby graveyard, tensions rise and old secrets resurface. When one of them whispers, "If you don't become the main character, you'll die," it's not just a threat—it’s a chilling reminder that in this labyrinthine city, survival hinges on more than just skill.
item.itunes:summary: In the heart of Sinistra's chaotic night market, five mercenaries gather for an illicit task: disposing of a corpse amid the bustling crowds. But as they descend into a hidden alley leading to a nearby graveyard, tensions rise and old secrets resurface. When one of them whispers, "If you don't become the main character, you'll die," it's not just a threat—it’s a chilling reminder that in this labyrinthine city, survival hinges on more than just skill.

item.title: Episode 48
item.description: In Episode 48, "If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die," our protagonist finds himself thrust into an unfamiliar city where everyone seems to know and greet his mysterious guide. As the innkeeper—dressed in a casual yet striking outfit—launches a bizarre welcome campaign at the train station, the merchant can’t help but feel this is more than just a welcoming act. The stakes are high; one wrong move could mean becoming lost in Sinistra forever, where only the true main character thrives.
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 48, "If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die," our protagonist finds himself thrust into an unfamiliar city where everyone seems to know and greet his mysterious guide. As the innkeeper—dressed in a casual yet striking outfit—launches a bizarre welcome campaign at the train station, the merchant can’t help but feel this is more than just a welcoming act. The stakes are high; one wrong move could mean becoming lost in Sinistra forever, where only the true main character thrives.

item.title: Episode 47
item.description: In Episode 47, "If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die," you find yourself navigating a church labyrinth where every step could be your last. As you breach restricted areas and confront the enigmatic Archbishop Butier, whose presence looms over the proceedings, the stakes are higher than ever—survival hinges on becoming the central figure in this deadly game of faith and power. Can you outmaneuver the archbishop's cryptic silence and unravel the hidden truths before it’s too late?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 47, "If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die," you find yourself navigating a church labyrinth where every step could be your last. As you breach restricted areas and confront the enigmatic Archbishop Butier, whose presence looms over the proceedings, the stakes are higher than ever—survival hinges on becoming the central figure in this deadly game of faith and power. Can you outmaneuver the archbishop's cryptic silence and unravel the hidden truths before it’s too late?

item.title: Episode 46 Preparing for proper guests and rest
item.description: In Episode 46: "Preparing for Proper Guests and Rest," the innkeeper's quiet life takes an unexpected turn as they prepare to host guests of a very different kind—ones who could either save or doom their mission. With stakes higher than just maintaining an inn, the team must quickly transform their establishment into something more fitting for proper guests, unaware that some visitors will be far from welcome.
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 46: "Preparing for Proper Guests and Rest," the innkeeper's quiet life takes an unexpected turn as they prepare to host guests of a very different kind—ones who could either save or doom their mission. With stakes higher than just maintaining an inn, the team must quickly transform their establishment into something more fitting for proper guests, unaware that some visitors will be far from welcome.

item.title: Episode 45 A secret visitor brings unexpected news
item.description: In a world where only the main character survives, Leonardo and Vittorio are preparing breakfast when an unexpected visitor arrives with a cryptic note. As tensions rise and the line between reality and fiction blurs, our hero must decide if embracing their true identity is worth the terrifying cost—or if they’ll be left to die in the shadows.
item.itunes:summary: In a world where only the main character survives, Leonardo and Vittorio are preparing breakfast when an unexpected visitor arrives with a cryptic note. As tensions rise and the line between reality and fiction blurs, our hero must decide if embracing their true identity is worth the terrifying cost—or if they’ll be left to die in the shadows.

item.title: Episode 44 The stage and the truth revealed
item.description: In Episode 44, the stakes are raised when the protagonist realizes they've been nothing more than a prop in a grand, deadly drama. As the bone pit reveals its chilling truth, they must navigate a world where everyone is acting their part—except for them. With each question Leonardo poses, the protagonist's facade begins to crack, threatening to expose not just their identity but their very survival.
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 44, the stakes are raised when the protagonist realizes they've been nothing more than a prop in a grand, deadly drama. As the bone pit reveals its chilling truth, they must navigate a world where everyone is acting their part—except for them. With each question Leonardo poses, the protagonist's facade begins to crack, threatening to expose not just their identity but their very survival.

item.title: I was extremely hungry, but neither Leonardo nor I were in a condition to head into the kitchen right away. I was drenched in sweat, and Leonardo was covered in their blood and reeked of sewage
item.description: In a desperate survival scenario, you're forced to rely on a stranger named Vittorio for food. As hunger gnaws at you, you watch helplessly as he rushes into the kitchen, leaving you alone with a body and surrounded by chaos. The stakes are high—eat or starve, but can you trust Vittorio not to leave you behind?
item.itunes:summary: In a desperate survival scenario, you're forced to rely on a stranger named Vittorio for food. As hunger gnaws at you, you watch helplessly as he rushes into the kitchen, leaving you alone with a body and surrounded by chaos. The stakes are high—eat or starve, but can you trust Vittorio not to leave you behind?

item.title: Episode 42 The ashes and the predator's gaze
item.description:
In a labyrinth where every shadow hides a threat, Leonardo stands alone amidst the ashes of his fallen comrades. His eyes gleam with an unsettling intensity, as if he’s not just surviving but thriving on the chaos around him. Can he be trusted, or is he already lost to the predator within?
As tension mounts and the stakes grow higher, you’ll find yourself questioning who—or what—you’re facing when the line between ally and enemy blurs in this heart-stopping episode.
item.itunes:summary:
In a labyrinth where every shadow hides a threat, Leonardo stands alone amidst the ashes of his fallen comrades. His eyes gleam with an unsettling intensity, as if he’s not just surviving but thriving on the chaos around him. Can he be trusted, or is he already lost to the predator within?
As tension mounts and the stakes grow higher, you’ll find yourself questioning who—or what—you’re facing when the line between ally and enemy blurs in this heart-stopping episode.

item.title: “How did you know”
item.description:
In a world where the dead walk and memories are currency, you're about to meet a creature that has swallowed too much truth—it's unraveling in real-time. Can you outmaneuver it before its essence consumes you entirely? Or will you become its next assimilation?
The stakes are higher than ever as you find yourself not just fighting for your life, but for your very identity—because if you don't take control, this thing might just rewrite the story of who you are.
item.itunes:summary:
In a world where the dead walk and memories are currency, you're about to meet a creature that has swallowed too much truth—it's unraveling in real-time. Can you outmaneuver it before its essence consumes you entirely? Or will you become its next assimilation?
The stakes are higher than ever as you find yourself not just fighting for your life, but for your very identity—because if you don't take control, this thing might just rewrite the story of who you are.

item.title: Episode 40
item.description: In Episode 40, our protagonist finds themselves in a race against time and their own reflection as they delve deeper into a sinister grave robbing operation. With every shadowy step, the line between friend and foe blurs, and one wrong move could mean becoming indistinguishable from the very creature hunting them—literally. Can they trust anyone, or will they become the main character in their own deadly game of hide-and-seek?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 40, our protagonist finds themselves in a race against time and their own reflection as they delve deeper into a sinister grave robbing operation. With every shadowy step, the line between friend and foe blurs, and one wrong move could mean becoming indistinguishable from the very creature hunting them—literally. Can they trust anyone, or will they become the main character in their own deadly game of hide-and-seek?

item.title: Episode 39 The labyrinth awaits us again
item.description: We descend into a labyrinthine underworld where every turn could lead to death. With only faint lantern light guiding our way, a group of tomb raiders must navigate through an ancient maze teeming with hidden dangers and secrets. As the walls close in, one member whispers, "If you don't become the main character today, you'll die." The stakes are clear: survive or be lost forever in this endless, water-stained labyrinth.
item.itunes:summary: We descend into a labyrinthine underworld where every turn could lead to death. With only faint lantern light guiding our way, a group of tomb raiders must navigate through an ancient maze teeming with hidden dangers and secrets. As the walls close in, one member whispers, "If you don't become the main character today, you'll die." The stakes are clear: survive or be lost forever in this endless, water-stained labyrinth.

item.title: Episode 38 Escape
item.description: In Episode 38: Escape, the stakes are raised as Leonardo must race against time to escape with Leovald's body—his every move watched by an unseen force. As he and a group of tomb raiders open the coffin, they find him eerily preserved, sparking whispers of magic or mummification. But when the quest timer starts ticking down, Leonardo realizes this might be more than just a simple retrieval; his actions could mean life or death for both himself and the innkeeper. Can he navigate this trap-filled sanctuary to escape unscathed?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 38: Escape, the stakes are raised as Leonardo must race against time to escape with Leovald's body—his every move watched by an unseen force. As he and a group of tomb raiders open the coffin, they find him eerily preserved, sparking whispers of magic or mummification. But when the quest timer starts ticking down, Leonardo realizes this might be more than just a simple retrieval; his actions could mean life or death for both himself and the innkeeper. Can he navigate this trap-filled sanctuary to escape unscathed?

item.title: Episode 37 The impossible nature of death's mechanics
item.description: In Episode 37, "The Impossible Nature of Death’s Mechanics," players find themselves thrust into a nightmare where death defies all logic. As the group battles grave robbers, one fatal strike leaves a corpse twitching with an unsettling life-like pulse, challenging every rule they thought they knew about combat and survival. Can they uncover the secret behind this gruesome anomaly before it's too late—or will they become its next victims?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 37, "The Impossible Nature of Death’s Mechanics," players find themselves thrust into a nightmare where death defies all logic. As the group battles grave robbers, one fatal strike leaves a corpse twitching with an unsettling life-like pulse, challenging every rule they thought they knew about combat and survival. Can they uncover the secret behind this gruesome anomaly before it's too late—or will they become its next victims?

item.title: Episode 36 The underground is opening up now
item.description: In Episode 36, the protagonist finds themselves trapped in a world where reality is anything but simple—where every shadow holds a threat and every step risks triggering an underground apocalypse. With no legendary weapon to rely on and surrounded by chaos, they must trust their companion—or risk becoming dinner for emerging horrors. Can they survive long enough to uncover the truth behind the sealed monsters?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 36, the protagonist finds themselves trapped in a world where reality is anything but simple—where every shadow holds a threat and every step risks triggering an underground apocalypse. With no legendary weapon to rely on and surrounded by chaos, they must trust their companion—or risk becoming dinner for emerging horrors. Can they survive long enough to uncover the truth behind the sealed monsters?

item.title: Episode 35 Waiting for blessings in holy water
item.description: In Episode 35: "Waiting for Blessings in Holy Water," Leovald finds himself in an unexpected role as he stands in line for a simple blessing, his patience stretched thin by the crowd's relentless wait. As the stakes grow higher and the line moves agonizingly slow, old battles fade into memory, replaced by a strange sense of peace—until a twist turns this mundane ritual into a life-or-death ordeal.
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 35: "Waiting for Blessings in Holy Water," Leovald finds himself in an unexpected role as he stands in line for a simple blessing, his patience stretched thin by the crowd's relentless wait. As the stakes grow higher and the line moves agonizingly slow, old battles fade into memory, replaced by a strange sense of peace—until a twist turns this mundane ritual into a life-or-death ordeal.

item.title: Episode 34 Whispers and bones in the labyrinth depths
item.description:
In the depths of Sinistra's labyrinth, whispers echo through corridors lined with bones, and every step feels like a gamble. As Leonardo races against time to retrieve Leovald’s body before Orlie the gravekeeper finds him, the line between survival and becoming the main character blurs dangerously thin—because in this game, not being the hero means certain death.
With each shadowy corner and crumbling bone, the stakes rise higher as you must decide: will you lead your party to safety—or let fate write your story?
item.itunes:summary:
In the depths of Sinistra's labyrinth, whispers echo through corridors lined with bones, and every step feels like a gamble. As Leonardo races against time to retrieve Leovald’s body before Orlie the gravekeeper finds him, the line between survival and becoming the main character blurs dangerously thin—because in this game, not being the hero means certain death.
With each shadowy corner and crumbling bone, the stakes rise higher as you must decide: will you lead your party to safety—or let fate write your story?

item.title: Episode 33 Into the darkness they descend now
item.description:
In Episode 33, "Into the Darkness They Descend Now," our heroes find themselves trapped in a deadly labyrinth with no escape route and a mysterious force closing in. As secrets from their past catch up to them, they must navigate through traps and shadows, each step bringing them closer to either survival or an untimely death.
The narrator's ominous warnings hint at more than just physical threats—there’s something sinister lurking in the labyrinth that could tear apart their group forever. Can they find the way out before it's too late? Or will they become the main characters in a deadly
item.itunes:summary:
In Episode 33, "Into the Darkness They Descend Now," our heroes find themselves trapped in a deadly labyrinth with no escape route and a mysterious force closing in. As secrets from their past catch up to them, they must navigate through traps and shadows, each step bringing them closer to either survival or an untimely death.
The narrator's ominous warnings hint at more than just physical threats—there’s something sinister lurking in the labyrinth that could tear apart their group forever. Can they find the way out before it's too late? Or will they become the main characters in a deadly

item.title: Episode 32 The tomb robbers gather for plunder
item.description: In Episode 32 of "If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die," seven tomb robbers converge on a notorious city harbor, each carrying heavy bags that hold their fate. As they slip into an eerie alleyway, tensions rise when unexpected reinforcements join their ranks—collaborators brought by their employer to claim a priceless artifact. With the stakes higher than ever, can the original team secure the loot before it's torn apart by internal strife?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 32 of "If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die," seven tomb robbers converge on a notorious city harbor, each carrying heavy bags that hold their fate. As they slip into an eerie alleyway, tensions rise when unexpected reinforcements join their ranks—collaborators brought by their employer to claim a priceless artifact. With the stakes higher than ever, can the original team secure the loot before it's torn apart by internal strife?

item.title: Episode 31 Fun Dungeon Exploration!
item.description: In Episode 31: "Fun Dungeon Exploration!" you're dropped into a world where reality is rewritten with every step you take. As you explore a decrepit dungeon with your companion Leonardo, old memories and new doubts blur the line between friend and foe. Could Orlie, once a trusted knight, be a creature in disguise, or are you losing your mind entirely?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 31: "Fun Dungeon Exploration!" you're dropped into a world where reality is rewritten with every step you take. As you explore a decrepit dungeon with your companion Leonardo, old memories and new doubts blur the line between friend and foe. Could Orlie, once a trusted knight, be a creature in disguise, or are you losing your mind entirely?

item.title: Episode 30
item.description: In Episode 30 of "If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die," our protagonist stumbles upon a mysterious scar on their wrist, only to find that their memories abruptly cut off just before its appearance. As shadows loom and the narrative fades out, they must race against time to uncover the truth—or risk becoming a forgotten bystander in their own story. Can they reclaim their role as the main character, or will the darkness consume them entirely?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 30 of "If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die," our protagonist stumbles upon a mysterious scar on their wrist, only to find that their memories abruptly cut off just before its appearance. As shadows loom and the narrative fades out, they must race against time to uncover the truth—or risk becoming a forgotten bystander in their own story. Can they reclaim their role as the main character, or will the darkness consume them entirely?

item.title: Episode 29 Something is definitely wrong with him
item.description:
In the heart of a fantastical world, our protagonist finds themselves thrust into a bizarre scenario where their companion's behavior defies all logic and character norms. As alliances fray and the stakes rise, they must decide whether to play along or risk unraveling the very fabric of this strange narrative—lest they become its tragic casualty.
With every word, the lines blur between reality and fantasy, as familiar tropes twist into something unsettlingly amiss. Can our hero navigate this labyrinthine plot without losing themselves—or worse?
item.itunes:summary:
In the heart of a fantastical world, our protagonist finds themselves thrust into a bizarre scenario where their companion's behavior defies all logic and character norms. As alliances fray and the stakes rise, they must decide whether to play along or risk unraveling the very fabric of this strange narrative—lest they become its tragic casualty.
With every word, the lines blur between reality and fantasy, as familiar tropes twist into something unsettlingly amiss. Can our hero navigate this labyrinthine plot without losing themselves—or worse?

item.title: Episode 28 Whispers of heroes and forgotten times
item.description: In Episode 28: "Whispers of Heroes and Forgotten Times," our protagonist stumbles upon unsettling truths about a legendary hero from their past. As they delve into tales of valor and betrayal, they realize that the line between truth and fiction is thinner than ever—especially when whispers suggest someone close to them holds secrets darker than any forgotten time. Can they trust anyone in this labyrinth of lies?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 28: "Whispers of Heroes and Forgotten Times," our protagonist stumbles upon unsettling truths about a legendary hero from their past. As they delve into tales of valor and betrayal, they realize that the line between truth and fiction is thinner than ever—especially when whispers suggest someone close to them holds secrets darker than any forgotten time. Can they trust anyone in this labyrinth of lies?

item.title: Episode 27 The truth behind my forgotten contract
item.description: In Episode 27, "The Truth Behind My Forgotten Contract," you're thrust into a nightmare where every action could be your last. When an enigmatic stranger named Orlie reveals a contract you can't recall making, you must decide if they are friend or foe. As the line between ally and enemy blurs, you wonder: Are you playing the main character—or are you already the villain?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 27, "The Truth Behind My Forgotten Contract," you're thrust into a nightmare where every action could be your last. When an enigmatic stranger named Orlie reveals a contract you can't recall making, you must decide if they are friend or foe. As the line between ally and enemy blurs, you wonder: Are you playing the main character—or are you already the villain?

item.title: Episode 26
item.description: In Episode 26: "If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die," you find yourself thrust into a medieval fantasy church where even the smallest actions could mean life or death. As you navigate through rituals and hidden meanings, you must decide whether to follow the crowd or trust your instincts—because in this world, not everyone is who they seem. Can you uncover the truth before it’s too late?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 26: "If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die," you find yourself thrust into a medieval fantasy church where even the smallest actions could mean life or death. As you navigate through rituals and hidden meanings, you must decide whether to follow the crowd or trust your instincts—because in this world, not everyone is who they seem. Can you uncover the truth before it’s too late?

item.title: Episode 25 Stocking up supplies in town today
item.description: In Episode 25: "Stocking Up Supplies in Town Today," the stakes are higher than ever as our protagonist declares the inn closed for business—forcing her to restock supplies before venturing into dangerous underground sewers. With time running out and a mysterious ten-year-old disaster looming, she must balance employee welfare with personal investigation, all while piling on more debt for Leonardo. Can she equip him with the right sword or will it prove too costly?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 25: "Stocking Up Supplies in Town Today," the stakes are higher than ever as our protagonist declares the inn closed for business—forcing her to restock supplies before venturing into dangerous underground sewers. With time running out and a mysterious ten-year-old disaster looming, she must balance employee welfare with personal investigation, all while piling on more debt for Leonardo. Can she equip him with the right sword or will it prove too costly?

item.title: Episode 24 The scenario weight has changed
item.description: In Episode 24, the stakes just escalated as our protagonist discovers their scenario weight inexplicably increased by an entire percentage point. With no apparent changes in the game or recent events, they find themselves thrust into a mysterious plot twist that threatens more than just their character's fate—now, it’s survival itself. Can they trust anyone in this shifting world?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 24, the stakes just escalated as our protagonist discovers their scenario weight inexplicably increased by an entire percentage point. With no apparent changes in the game or recent events, they find themselves thrust into a mysterious plot twist that threatens more than just their character's fate—now, it’s survival itself. Can they trust anyone in this shifting world?

item.title: Episode 23 The predator's quiet victory begins
item.description: In the dead of night, a shadow moves through the city's alleys, carrying with it the weight of a life that may soon slip away. As Leovald cradles his exhausted companion, he finds himself drawn deeper into a labyrinth of secrets and schemes—each step bringing him closer to either survival or oblivion. Can he uncover the true nature of their journey before it's too late?
item.itunes:summary: In the dead of night, a shadow moves through the city's alleys, carrying with it the weight of a life that may soon slip away. As Leovald cradles his exhausted companion, he finds himself drawn deeper into a labyrinth of secrets and schemes—each step bringing him closer to either survival or oblivion. Can he uncover the true nature of their journey before it's too late?

item.title: Episode 22 The plan needs a mysterious third party
item.description: In Episode 22, our protagonist forces a reluctant ally to orchestrate a daring heist from behind the scenes, using a mysterious third party to pull off the impossible. As the plan unfolds, tensions rise and trust fractures—leaving Lopez with a choice: follow orders or face certain death. The stakes are high, and one wrong move could unravel everything.
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 22, our protagonist forces a reluctant ally to orchestrate a daring heist from behind the scenes, using a mysterious third party to pull off the impossible. As the plan unfolds, tensions rise and trust fractures—leaving Lopez with a choice: follow orders or face certain death. The stakes are high, and one wrong move could unravel everything.

item.title: Episode 21 The art of gentle psychological torture
item.description: In Episode 21, tensions reach boiling point as Leonardo's gentle psychological torture takes a sinister turn. When his usual kindness toward Vittorio and the narrator turns into cold manipulation, they must question their trust in him—especially when he hints at their impending doom. Can they navigate this treacherous roleplay without becoming its tragic victims?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 21, tensions reach boiling point as Leonardo's gentle psychological torture takes a sinister turn. When his usual kindness toward Vittorio and the narrator turns into cold manipulation, they must question their trust in him—especially when he hints at their impending doom. Can they navigate this treacherous roleplay without becoming its tragic victims?

item.title: Episode 20 Entering Roald's manor under cover of night
item.description: In the dead of night, two intruders scale Baron Roald’s ethereal manor wall, evading a drunken guard whose loyalty is questionable at best. As they slip into the mansion’s shadows, the stakes are higher than ever—survival hinges on their ability to navigate the manor undetected while avoiding not just the baron’s enemies but also his own unpredictable hospitality.
item.itunes:summary: In the dead of night, two intruders scale Baron Roald’s ethereal manor wall, evading a drunken guard whose loyalty is questionable at best. As they slip into the mansion’s shadows, the stakes are higher than ever—survival hinges on their ability to navigate the manor undetected while avoiding not just the baron’s enemies but also his own unpredictable hospitality.

item.title: Episode 19 Searching in the Dark
item.description: In Episode 19: "Searching in the Dark," Leonardo finds himself trapped in Baron Roald’s shadowed manor, his every move watched by unseen forces. As he searches Viscount Lopez's room, dark secrets from the Count of Bermont’s past emerge, threatening to unravel a sinister plot. Can Leonardo uncover the truth before the shadows claim him—or will he become just another forgotten corpse?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 19: "Searching in the Dark," Leonardo finds himself trapped in Baron Roald’s shadowed manor, his every move watched by unseen forces. As he searches Viscount Lopez's room, dark secrets from the Count of Bermont’s past emerge, threatening to unravel a sinister plot. Can Leonardo uncover the truth before the shadows claim him—or will he become just another forgotten corpse?

item.title: Episode 18 The system's hidden rules revealed
item.description: In Episode 18, the stakes are higher than ever as Leovald must navigate a dangerous scenario where his body is targeted by the villainous Viscount Lopez. With each passing moment, he inches closer to becoming the main character—or facing certain death. Can he uncover the hidden rules of this deadly game and survive long enough to understand the true nature of this world?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 18, the stakes are higher than ever as Leovald must navigate a dangerous scenario where his body is targeted by the villainous Viscount Lopez. With each passing moment, he inches closer to becoming the main character—or facing certain death. Can he uncover the hidden rules of this deadly game and survive long enough to understand the true nature of this world?

item.title: Episode 17 The deep tunnels and unexpected help
item.description: In Episode 17, you find yourself navigating pitch-black tunnels with barely enough air to breathe, where every step could be your last. When Leonardo catches you mid-fall, his quick reflexes become your only lifeline in this underground labyrinth. As the stakes rise and the map reveals just how far you’ve yet to go, you can't help but wonder—will you find the way out or become lost forever?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 17, you find yourself navigating pitch-black tunnels with barely enough air to breathe, where every step could be your last. When Leonardo catches you mid-fall, his quick reflexes become your only lifeline in this underground labyrinth. As the stakes rise and the map reveals just how far you’ve yet to go, you can't help but wonder—will you find the way out or become lost forever?

item.title: Episode 16
item.description: In Episode 16, the stakes rise as our protagonist is thrust deeper into a dangerous game where every move could mean life or death. With shadows lurking and cryptic letters appearing in the dark, they must navigate through treacherous tunnels while hiding their true identity from a seemingly harmless guide. Can they trust anyone—or will the darkness consume them entirely?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 16, the stakes rise as our protagonist is thrust deeper into a dangerous game where every move could mean life or death. With shadows lurking and cryptic letters appearing in the dark, they must navigate through treacherous tunnels while hiding their true identity from a seemingly harmless guide. Can they trust anyone—or will the darkness consume them entirely?

item.title: Episode 15 The futility of searching for answers
item.description: In Episode 15, our protagonist finds themselves trapped in a labyrinth of unanswered questions. As they search for clues about mysterious "cloak-wearing figures," the stakes rise when Leonardo's physical limitations threaten to derail their mission. With every dead-end and unanswered query, the tension builds—will they uncover the truth, or will the futility of their quest lead to disaster?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 15, our protagonist finds themselves trapped in a labyrinth of unanswered questions. As they search for clues about mysterious "cloak-wearing figures," the stakes rise when Leonardo's physical limitations threaten to derail their mission. With every dead-end and unanswered query, the tension builds—will they uncover the truth, or will the futility of their quest lead to disaster?

item.title: Episode 14 The missing dog mystery begins now
item.description: In Episode 14, Leonardo is thrust into a high-stakes mystery when a ship's captain begs for help finding his missing mascot cat, Roboy. With time ticking and a fierce storm brewing on the horizon, every corner of the harbor holds secrets—some sinister—and the fate of both the cat and the ship hangs in the balance. Can Leonardo solve the puzzle before it’s too late?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 14, Leonardo is thrust into a high-stakes mystery when a ship's captain begs for help finding his missing mascot cat, Roboy. With time ticking and a fierce storm brewing on the horizon, every corner of the harbor holds secrets—some sinister—and the fate of both the cat and the ship hangs in the balance. Can Leonardo solve the puzzle before it’s too late?

item.title: Episode 13 Leonardo arrives with a mystery
item.description: In Episode 13, the stakes are higher than ever as Leonardo bursts into your room early morning, carrying secrets that could either save or doom you. With clues stacking up and a mysterious visitor who knows more than he's letting on, you must decide: will you embrace your fate as the main character, or risk becoming one of the many left behind?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 13, the stakes are higher than ever as Leonardo bursts into your room early morning, carrying secrets that could either save or doom you. With clues stacking up and a mysterious visitor who knows more than he's letting on, you must decide: will you embrace your fate as the main character, or risk becoming one of the many left behind?

item.title: Episode 12 The truth behind the ranking system
item.description: In a world where your rank determines your survival, a mysterious innkeeper reveals shocking truths about the ranking system. As tension mounts and alliances shift, one misstep could spell death—literally. Can you trust the charming yet suspicious innkeeper who seems to know more than she lets on?
item.itunes:summary: In a world where your rank determines your survival, a mysterious innkeeper reveals shocking truths about the ranking system. As tension mounts and alliances shift, one misstep could spell death—literally. Can you trust the charming yet suspicious innkeeper who seems to know more than she lets on?

item.title: Episode 11 Chicken chasing reveals my weakness
item.description: In a world where survival hinges on your ability to become the main character, you'd think catching chickens would be child’s play. But when our hero realizes her stamina is non-existent by chicken standards, she faces a harsh reality: either master this bizarre skill or risk starvation in a future world. With Leonardo's effortless prowess drawing crowds and whispers of admiration, can she ever hope to catch up—or will her poor fitness cost her life?
item.itunes:summary: In a world where survival hinges on your ability to become the main character, you'd think catching chickens would be child’s play. But when our hero realizes her stamina is non-existent by chicken standards, she faces a harsh reality: either master this bizarre skill or risk starvation in a future world. With Leonardo's effortless prowess drawing crowds and whispers of admiration, can she ever hope to catch up—or will her poor fitness cost her life?

item.title: Episode 10 Sub-Quest
item.description: In the bustling streets of Sinistra, Leonardo finds himself thrust into a chaotic sub-quest where his quick thinking and nimble hands are put to the test. As he catches chickens and solves petty disputes, his reputation grows, drawing unwanted attention from powerful figures like Baron Roald. But as Leonardo's fame spreads, so does the risk—could solving these small problems lead to an even larger, more dangerous challenge that threatens everything he holds dear?
item.itunes:summary: In the bustling streets of Sinistra, Leonardo finds himself thrust into a chaotic sub-quest where his quick thinking and nimble hands are put to the test. As he catches chickens and solves petty disputes, his reputation grows, drawing unwanted attention from powerful figures like Baron Roald. But as Leonardo's fame spreads, so does the risk—could solving these small problems lead to an even larger, more dangerous challenge that threatens everything he holds dear?

item.title: Episode 9 The unexpected arrival changes everything
item.description: In Episode 9 of "If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die," Vittorio's sudden declaration to return to an uncertain fate sets off a chain of events that threaten the very balance of the story. As mysterious children from his past reappear, the line between safety and danger blurs, leaving Leonardo and his companions caught in a web of intrigue where every decision could be their last.
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 9 of "If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die," Vittorio's sudden declaration to return to an uncertain fate sets off a chain of events that threaten the very balance of the story. As mysterious children from his past reappear, the line between safety and danger blurs, leaving Leonardo and his companions caught in a web of intrigue where every decision could be their last.

item.title: Episode 8 A necklace and some dangerous secrets
item.description: In the shadowy alleys of a forgotten town, you stumble upon secrets that could either make or break your life. A simple purchase at a market stall unravels a web of noble deceit and hidden loyalties, where every word spoken might be a trap—or your only chance to survive. Are you brave enough to uncover the truth behind Lord Lopez’s sudden interest in an ancient moonstone necklace?
item.itunes:summary: In the shadowy alleys of a forgotten town, you stumble upon secrets that could either make or break your life. A simple purchase at a market stall unravels a web of noble deceit and hidden loyalties, where every word spoken might be a trap—or your only chance to survive. Are you brave enough to uncover the truth behind Lord Lopez’s sudden interest in an ancient moonstone necklace?

item.title: Episode 7
item.description: In a world where every detail could be a clue to survival, a young investigator uncovers a web of subtle signs leading to an impending visit by a powerful noble. But as she pieces together the fragments—cheap cuts of meat, unusual purchases from servants—the stakes grow higher with each revelation. Can she decipher the cryptic signals before it's too late, or will she become just another casualty in this game of hidden agendas?
item.itunes:summary: In a world where every detail could be a clue to survival, a young investigator uncovers a web of subtle signs leading to an impending visit by a powerful noble. But as she pieces together the fragments—cheap cuts of meat, unusual purchases from servants—the stakes grow higher with each revelation. Can she decipher the cryptic signals before it's too late, or will she become just another casualty in this game of hidden agendas?

item.title: Episode 6 A meal breaks down suspicion's walls
item.description: In a grim alleyway, food becomes the unexpected key to breaking through years of suspicion and distrust. As strangers gather around a basket of sustenance, one traveler offers a deal that could either save or doom them all—revealing secrets that threaten their very survival in this harsh world. Can they trust the innkeeper’s seemingly innocent proposition?
item.itunes:summary: In a grim alleyway, food becomes the unexpected key to breaking through years of suspicion and distrust. As strangers gather around a basket of sustenance, one traveler offers a deal that could either save or doom them all—revealing secrets that threaten their very survival in this harsh world. Can they trust the innkeeper’s seemingly innocent proposition?

item.title: Episode 5 The Afterlife of the Good Person
item.description: In a world where you can only become the main character by changing your actions, one man finds himself trapped in an endless cycle of repetition—where every coin he collects seems to be a lifeline and a curse. As dawn breaks and he returns to the inn with a pouch heavier than his worries, Leonardo must decide: is it worth risking everything to finally claim his narrative destiny—or will he be forever stuck as a mere observer?
item.itunes:summary: In a world where you can only become the main character by changing your actions, one man finds himself trapped in an endless cycle of repetition—where every coin he collects seems to be a lifeline and a curse. As dawn breaks and he returns to the inn with a pouch heavier than his worries, Leonardo must decide: is it worth risking everything to finally claim his narrative destiny—or will he be forever stuck as a mere observer?

item.title: Episode 4 Whispers and toasts to a fallen hero
item.description: In the shadow of a tragic hero's death, whispers of conspiracy and betrayal swirl through the halls of power. As mourners toast to a fallen legend, one patron's hidden agenda threatens to unravel the very fabric of the kingdom—a tale where loyalty is tested, and only the true main character can survive.
item.itunes:summary: In the shadow of a tragic hero's death, whispers of conspiracy and betrayal swirl through the halls of power. As mourners toast to a fallen legend, one patron's hidden agenda threatens to unravel the very fabric of the kingdom—a tale where loyalty is tested, and only the true main character can survive.

item.title: Episode 3 The Inn Becomes an Information Guild
item.description:
You’re not just an innkeeper anymore—you’re a master manipulator, weaving through secrets like a shadow. As your "Innkeeper’s Insight" ability reveals hidden truths, you must decide: play the supporting role or become the star? One wrong move could mean death in this world where every character has a secret agenda.
The inn is no longer just a gathering place—it's a labyrinth of power and intrigue. With information at your fingertips, you’re poised to rewrite your fate. But as alliances shift and enemies emerge, can you navigate the treacherous waters without becoming collateral damage?
item.itunes:summary:
You’re not just an innkeeper anymore—you’re a master manipulator, weaving through secrets like a shadow. As your "Innkeeper’s Insight" ability reveals hidden truths, you must decide: play the supporting role or become the star? One wrong move could mean death in this world where every character has a secret agenda.
The inn is no longer just a gathering place—it's a labyrinth of power and intrigue. With information at your fingertips, you’re poised to rewrite your fate. But as alliances shift and enemies emerge, can you navigate the treacherous waters without becoming collateral damage?

item.title: Episode 2 Securing My Home, Success
item.description: In a world where your "scenario importance" determines your very existence, one misstep could mean eternal erasure—worse than death itself. When Leonardo, lost in a drunken stupor, finds himself face-to-face with his own demise, the stakes are higher than he ever imagined. Can he reclaim his true identity before it's too late, or will he vanish into nothingness forever?
item.itunes:summary: In a world where your "scenario importance" determines your very existence, one misstep could mean eternal erasure—worse than death itself. When Leonardo, lost in a drunken stupor, finds himself face-to-face with his own demise, the stakes are higher than he ever imagined. Can he reclaim his true identity before it's too late, or will he vanish into nothingness forever?

item.title: Episode 1 The First Scene of the Stage
item.description: You’ve just died, and now you're thrust into a world where life is nothing more than a meticulously scripted play. As an insignificant extra with no lines, the only way to survive is to somehow become the star of the show—or risk being erased from existence entirely. Can you find your purpose in this cosmic stage, or will you fade into obscurity forever?
item.itunes:summary: You’ve just died, and now you're thrust into a world where life is nothing more than a meticulously scripted play. As an insignificant extra with no lines, the only way to survive is to somehow become the star of the show—or risk being erased from existence entirely. Can you find your purpose in this cosmic stage, or will you fade into obscurity forever?
